title: Bonney Sees Kuma’s Memories
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, King Bekori, Unknown person #2, Dragon, Unknown person #3, Kuma as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 8 years after the God Valley incident... (30 years ago)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please help me, Kumachi!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: days and months pass by...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been coming here since your PA was around.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It came as a nasty shock when you all went and disappeared on us...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are hardly any Yonguns left in this country these days. It's no wonder we're getting poorer and poorer.

dialogue.speaker: King Bekori
dialogue.text: Kingdom of sorbet, South Blue

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it's comforting to know you grew into such a sweet boy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your parents did a great job, I'm sure they're so proud of you becoming a bonafide clergyman!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PASTER BARTHOLOM KUMA (17-YERS-OLD)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AAAAAH, WHAT A RELIEF: I FEEL SO MUCH BETTER, BLESS YOU!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ME NEXT! MY HPS ARE KILLING ME!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We can't thank you enough!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: God bless your miracle hands!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Can't you do this on weekdays too?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fat Chance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sundays only!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Where do you freeloading old bags...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Get off asking for even more help?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ha Ha, we've gotten the attention of little Miss Cheapskate!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit Flappin' your gums! This isn't a nursing home!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd tell you to wash your mouth out if you weren't such a cute pie!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard there's no end to the number of suitors that come knockin' on her door:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't change the subject!

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: GINNY (21-years-old)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: None of them have a chance with Kumachi here!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just looking into that calm face of his is enough to comfort anyone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're too kind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're the one who's too kind!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To tell the truth, we'd love to donate and support our kumachi....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we've all been struggling just to meet the celestial tribute recently!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure you've heard about our new King, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They say King Begori is a gold hearted monster.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's hell bent on paying the tribute, and he doesn't care about whether us old farts are too sick to contribute...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If we can't, they'll lock us up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's the worst!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The other day, an acquaintance of mine ended up starving to death in their cell!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Can you believe that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That miserly King of Ours Won't Even Feed His Prisoners!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's even more of a cheapeste than you, Ginny!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yet he's happy to bend over backwards for the celestial dragons!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we don't stay in good health, we're gonna get killed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can get rid of any pain or mild illnesses you need me to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...so please visit every week.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Thanks so much, kumachii!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
